scripts.build: npm run build -w @obsidian-web-local/shared && npm run build -w @obsidian-web-local/helper && npm run build -w @obsidian-web-local/web
scripts.dev: npm run build -w @obsidian-web-local/shared && concurrently -n helper,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @obsidian-web-local/helper" "npm run dev -w @obsidian-web-local/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @obsidian-web-local/shared && npm run typecheck -w @obsidian-web-local/helper && npm run typecheck -w @obsidian-web-local/web
